response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable Java proficiency in professional contexts, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about role alignment and cultural fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong contributions to open-source and community education initiatives
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing to meet required fluency
No clear evidence of Java usage in professional projects despite listing it
Senior-level titles and experience far exceed entry-level role expectations
